tasks.label: validate-protocol-fix
tasks.command: yarn lint && yarn build && yarn test

tasks.label: validate-media-protocol-rewrite
tasks.command: yarn lint && yarn build && yarn test

tasks.label: validate-media-protocol-rewrite-2
tasks.command: yarn lint && yarn build && yarn test

tasks.label: validate-file-protocol-mapping
tasks.command: yarn lint && yarn build && yarn test

tasks.label: validate-source-file-guard
tasks.command: yarn lint && yarn build && yarn test

tasks.label: validate-export-audio-compat-fix
tasks.command: yarn test && yarn lint && yarn build

tasks.label: validate-accurate-trim-fix
tasks.command: yarn test && yarn lint && yarn build

tasks.label: validate-trim-mode-and-progress
tasks.command: yarn test && yarn lint && yarn build

tasks.label: validate-menu-and-outputdir-persistence
tasks.command: yarn test && yarn lint && yarn build

tasks.label: validate-about-window-blank-fix
tasks.command: yarn lint && yarn build && yarn test

tasks.label: validate-cutrail-diagnostics-window
tasks.command: yarn test && yarn lint && yarn build

tasks.label: revalidate-cutrail-diagnostics-window
tasks.command: yarn test && yarn lint && yarn build

tasks.label: final-validate-cutrail-diagnostics-window
tasks.command: yarn lint && yarn build && yarn test

tasks.label: validate-window-split-and-menu
tasks.command: yarn test && yarn lint && yarn build

tasks.label: check-icon-tools
tasks.command: command -v convert || true; command -v magick || true; command -v inkscape || true; command -v iconutil || true; command -v icotool || true

tasks.label: test-icon-convert
tasks.command: mkdir -p .tmp/icons-test && magick src/assets/logo-white-bg.svg -resize 1024x1024 .tmp/icons-test/icon.png && magick .tmp/icons-test/icon.png -define icon:auto-resize=16,24,32,48,64,128,256 .tmp/icons-test/icon.ico && magick .tmp/icons-test/icon.png .tmp/icons-test/icon.icns && ls -la .tmp/icons-test

tasks.label: generate-packaging-icons
tasks.command: mkdir -p src/assets/icons && magick src/assets/logo-white-bg.svg -resize 1024x1024 src/assets/icons/icon.png && magick src/assets/icons/icon.png -define icon:auto-resize=16,24,32,48,64,128,256 src/assets/icons/icon.ico && magick src/assets/icons/icon.png src/assets/icons/icon.icns && ls -la src/assets/icons

tasks.label: src-line-audit
tasks.command: find src -type f \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.mjs' -o -name '*.jsx' -o -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' -o -name '*.css.ts' \) -print0 | xargs -0 -I{} sh -c 'wc -l "{}"' | sort -nr

tasks.label: post-refactor-audit
tasks.command: find src -type f \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.mjs' -o -name '*.jsx' -o -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' -o -name '*.css.ts' \) -print0 | xargs -0 -I{} sh -c 'wc -l "{}"' | sort -nr

tasks.label: second-line-audit
tasks.command: find src -type f \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.mjs' -o -name '*.jsx' -o -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' -o -name '*.css.ts' \) -print0 | xargs -0 -I{} sh -c 'wc -l "{}"' | sort -nr | head -n 20

tasks.label: third-line-audit
tasks.command: find src -type f \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.mjs' -o -name '*.jsx' -o -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' -o -name '*.css.ts' \) -print0 | xargs -0 -I{} sh -c 'wc -l "{}"' | sort -nr | head -n 12

tasks.label: final-verify-restrictions-rollout
tasks.command: yarn lint && yarn build && find src -type f \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.mjs' -o -name '*.jsx' -o -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' -o -name '*.css.ts' \) -print0 | xargs -0 -I{} sh -c 'wc -l "{}"' | sort -nr | head -n 10

tasks.label: verify-window-layout
tasks.command: find src/renderer/windows -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort && rg -n "from './(App|DiagnosticsApp|LicensesApp)'|from \"\./(App|DiagnosticsApp|LicensesApp)\"" src/renderer/main.jsx src/renderer -g '*.jsx' -g '*.js'

tasks.label: check-line-counts-core-refactor
tasks.command: wc -l src/main/windows/windowManager.mjs src/main/ipc.mjs src/main/menu.mjs src/main/main.mjs src/preload/preload.mjs src/renderer/windows/editor/EditorWindow.useWorkflow.js src/renderer/windows/editor/EditorWindow.css.ts src/renderer/windows/app/AppWindow.css.ts

tasks.label: line-audit-restructured-files
tasks.command: wc -l src/main/ipc.mjs src/main/ipc/registerHandlers.mjs src/main/ipc/handlers/*.mjs src/main/windows/*.mjs src/renderer/core/clipping/*.js src/renderer/core/clipping/*.jsx src/renderer/windows/editor/components/TimelineEditor/* src/renderer/components/utility/*

tasks.label: final-line-audit
tasks.command: wc -l src/renderer/core/clipping/* src/main/ipc/handlers/*.mjs src/main/windows/*.mjs && rg -n "windows/components/utility|components/TimelineEditor|EditorWindow.useWorkflow|src/main/windows/windowManager.mjs|src/main/windows/windowDefaults.mjs|src/main/windows/windowLoad.mjs" src

tasks.label: structure-audit-pass
tasks.command: find src/renderer -maxdepth 6 -type f | sort && find src/main -maxdepth 4 -type f | sort

tasks.label: global-line-limit-audit
tasks.command: find src -type f \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.jsx' -o -name '*.mjs' -o -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' -o -name '*.css.ts' \) -print0 | xargs -0 wc -l | awk '$1>200{print}'
